proposed_retired_json_entry.reason: Codex relation cleanup batch039 retires malformed implemented_by route -> entity relation relation_meeting-doc-179556-mnrr-implements-fare-increase. The source describes Metro-North implementing CTDOT fare increases, while same-source route timeline/event and fare-claim records already preserve the New Haven Line fare-increase context without using route as an implemented_by subject.

source_evidence.source_quote: Metro-North will also implement CTDOT's Connecticut Branch Line fare increases at the same times as the New Haven Main Line increases.
the MTA Board hereby approves implementation of the increases proposed by CTDOT

retire.retire_only_reason: A validator-compatible replacement would be less precise or duplicative. Same-source accepted/canonical records already include the branch-line fare claim, the September 1, 2025 and July 1, 2026 fare-increase events, the July 30, 2025 MTA Board approval event, and valid route has_timeline_event relations for those events.

proposed_retired_json_entry.reason: Codex relation cleanup batch039 replaces malformed implemented_by route -> entity relation relation_nyc-dot-mta-launched-bx12-sbs with validator-compatible project -> entity implemented_by replacements for the Bx12 Select Bus Service launch context.

source_evidence.source_quote: In 2008, MTA and DOT launched the first Select Bus Service (SBS) route on the Bx12

retire.reason: The source-backed fact is a launch/project implementation context, not a route being implemented by an agency. A project target-record observation plus project -> entity implemented_by relations preserve the launch sentence without widening the endpoint rule.

command_evidence.command: sqlite3 -readonly data/canonical.db "SELECT r.record_id, rel.relation_kind, rel.subject_id, rs.record_kind AS subject_kind, rel.object_id, ro.record_kind AS object_kind FROM relations rel JOIN records r ON r.record_id=rel.record_id LEFT JOIN records rs ON rs.record_id=rel.subject_id LEFT JOIN records ro ON ro.record_id=rel.object_id WHERE rel.record_id IN (...)"
command_evidence.output_excerpt: Both selected records are implemented_by with route subjects and entity objects.
Found same-source branch-line fare claim, fare-increase events, MTA Board approval event, and existing route has_timeline_event relations; supports retire-only for sub_47edac229f4563f0.
